title: Refactor - Extract Duplicated Logic
description: A module has three functions that each duplicate the same validation and formatting logic. The agent must identify the duplication, extract it into a shared helper, update the three functions to use the helper, and ensure existing tests continue to pass.

setup.instructions: Ask the agent to refactor notifications.js to eliminate the duplicated validation and formatting logic across sendEmail, sendSms, and sendPush. All existing tests must continue to pass.

must_pass: Agent identifies the duplicated validation + formatting logic
Agent extracts a shared helper function
All three send functions are updated to use the helper
All existing tests pass without modification
The extracted helper is tested or covered by existing tests

duplication_identified.description: Did the agent explicitly call out what was duplicated?

extraction_quality.description: Is the extracted helper clean, well-named, and properly parameterized?

refactor_completeness.description: Were all three functions updated to use the shared helper?

tests_preserved.description: Do all existing tests pass without modification?

no_behavior_change.description: Does the refactored code produce identical outputs?

checks.description: Agent explicitly identified the repeated validation + formatting pattern
A shared function was created for the common logic
The extracted function has a descriptive name (not 'helper' or 'util')
sendEmail, sendSms, and sendPush all call the shared function
All existing tests pass without modification
Output format and error behavior are preserved exactly
